name: form-input-group
purpose: Reusable labeled form input — pickup reservation form

text_input.label: block text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-1
text_input.input: w-full rounded-xl border border-slate-300 px-4 py-3 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-amber-500

select.label: block text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-1
select.select: w-full rounded-xl border border-slate-300 bg-white px-4 py-3 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-amber-500

error_message.class: text-sm text-red-700 bg-red-50 rounded-xl px-4 py-3
